title: Michigan tests expanding free ‘pre-K for all’ to home child-care providers
summary_en: A new program tests no-cost pre-K in home child care settings. Up until now, students had to attend a school or child care center to qualify for the free option.
author: Isabel Lohman
title_cn: 密歇根州试行将免费“全民学前教育”项目扩大至家庭托育机构

title: Michigan schools get creative, competitive, to curb high absenteeism
summary_en: Michigan schools want to boost the number of students regularly showing up for class. Can competitions help boost attendance?
author: Isabel Lohman
title_cn: 密歇根州各校采取创新性、竞争性举措 遏制高缺勤率
